notes: C3176 Lead: Task #102 OPEN — admin login broken on Vercel (NextAuth Configuration error). Bolt unpaused + forced next. Sage/Trace/Aria/Guard paused. ⚠️ ROOT CAUSE of 14x pause-map clearing: devloop_engine.py:460-468 unconditionally sets control['pause']={} after Lead runs. Bectly must fix Engine code — change line 467 to only clear 'until_lead_directive' entries (like orchestrator does at line 2096-2100). Until fixed, pauses will be wiped every Lead cycle.

schema.pause: Map of agent_name to condition (paused or until_next_bolt_commit or until_lead_directive)
schema.force_next: Agent name to force as next scheduled, or null. Cleared after use.
schema.interval_override: Map of agent_name to run_every integer
